text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 116 

GAP_MO_COINS_1M 

LABEL: Gap Coinsurance Standard Mail Order — One-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a one-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using a standard mail order pharmacy during the coverage gap phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: —
